summary: Tutoring Room B projector will not power on
description: Reported by the Thursday GED tutor. The ceiling projector in Tutoring Room B shows no power light; students could not view the shared screen. Please check the power supply or replace the unit.

summary: Booking system will not save tutoring-room reservations
description: Front-desk staff cannot save room reservations past the email-confirmation step; the request hangs and no confirmation is sent to patrons. Needs review of the booking system.

summary: Catalog kiosk near the entrance freezes on the search screen
description: The self-service catalog kiosk by the front entrance freezes when patrons search the collection and has to be restarted. Please diagnose and reimage if needed.

summary: Weak Wi-Fi signal in the tutoring rooms
description: Patrons and tutors report the Wi-Fi keeps dropping in Tutoring Rooms A and B. Please check the access point coverage in the east wing.

summary: Public PC in Tutoring Room A restarts on its own
description: The public-use PC in Tutoring Room A restarts unexpectedly during sessions, losing patrons' work. Please investigate the machine and check for a failing drive.

summary: Networked printer in the tutoring area is offline
description: The shared printer in the tutoring area shows offline and patrons cannot print study materials. Please reconnect it to the print server or replace the toner if that is the cause.

summary: Request an HDMI adapter for the Tutoring Room B laptop cart
description: Requested by Juan for GED tutoring sessions. The loaner laptop cart needs an HDMI adapter so tutors can connect to the room projector. Please order one from the supply budget.

summary: Add a tutoring-room block to the online room-booking calendar
description: Requested by the volunteer coordinator. Please add a recurring Thursday-morning hold on the booking calendar so the GED tutoring room is not double-booked.

summary: Catalog kiosk receipt printer is out of paper and jams
description: The receipt printer on the second catalog kiosk jams and is out of paper. Please clear the jam, reload paper, and add it to the supply-restock list.

summary: Projector remote in Tutoring Room A has an unresponsive input button
description: The input-source button on the Tutoring Room A projector remote does not respond, so tutors cannot switch between the PC and the laptop cart. Please replace the remote or its batteries.

description: Reported by the Thursday GED tutor. The ceiling projector in Tutoring Room B shows no power light; students could not view the shared screen. Please check the power supply or replace the unit.
